meta.description: Background on the organisations and people who appear as donors in the AEC disclosures, so readers can see what the source of a donation actually is. Each record adds a link to the donor's own website or social media and a short, factual description. Keyed by the exact donor name as disclosed to the AEC; the same entity may appear under several spellings.
meta.note: Descriptions are factual and sourced; they describe who the donor is, not any judgement about the donation. Individuals (as opposed to organisations) are generally not profiled.

Mineralogy Pty Ltd.description: Mineralogy is a privately held mining and exploration company, principally involved in iron ore (magnetite) in Western Australia's Pilbara region, founded and owned by businessman Clive Palmer.

Cormack Foundation Pty Ltd.description: The Cormack Foundation is an Australian investment company and registered associated entity of the Liberal Party of Australia (Victorian Division), established in 1988 with proceeds from the sale of Melbourne radio station 3XY.

Pratt Holdings.description: Pratt Holdings Proprietary Limited is the private holding company of the Pratt family's Visy group, a paper, packaging and recycling business; it is controlled by Australian businessman Anthony Pratt, chairman of Visy.

Mining and Energy Union.description: The Mining and Energy Union (MEU) is an Australian trade union representing workers in the coal mining and energy industries; it became an independent registered organisation in December 2023 after withdrawing from the CFMMEU.

United Workers Union.description: The United Workers Union (UWU) is an Australian trade union covering more than 150,000 workers across over 45 industries, formed in 2019 from the merger of United Voice and the National Union of Workers.

Australian Manufacturing Workers Union.description: The Australian Manufacturing Workers' Union (AMWU), officially the Automotive, Food, Metals, Engineering, Printing and Kindred Industries Union, is an Australian trade union representing workers in the manufacturing and industrial sectors. HEALTH SERVICES UNION NSW.description: The Health Services Union (HSU) is an Australian trade union representing workers in the healthcare and social assistance sectors, including hospital, ambulance, aged care and allied health staff. The NSW branch is part of the national HSU.
